# circleci Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "circleci" {
  host = "https://circleci.com/api/v2"
  #key         = "*****"
  #runner_host = "https://runner.circleci.com" # required for self-hosted runner resources on CircleCI server
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `host` (String)
- `key` (String, Sensitive)
- `runner_host` (String)
